---
title: "About"
image: profile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com

---

I am currently a second year PhD student at Télécom SudParis - Institut Polytechnique de Paris under the supervision of Sylvain Le Corff and Yohan Petetin.
